# JWHERBAL

> ร้านค้าออนไลน์สมุนไพรและผลิตภัณฑ์เพื่อสุขภาพคุณภาพ พร้อมบทความความรู้และชุมชนแลกเปลี่ยนประสบการณ์ — เน้นผลิตภัณฑ์ JWHERBAL DRINK และ JWHERBAL Capsule (V FLOW)

JWHERBAL is a Thai herbal wellness brand offering two core products — a herbal drink and capsule formulation (V FLOW) — alongside educational health articles, customer reviews, and a community forum.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand story, featured products, latest articles.
- [About](/about): Company mission, values, and certifications.
- [Shop](/shop): Full product catalog (V FLOW Drink and Capsule).
- [V FLOW Product](/shop/vflow): Detailed product page with ingredients, usage, and FAQ.
- [Articles](/articles): Health and herbal wisdom blog.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Customer testimonials and star ratings.
- [Community](/community): User forum for herbal and wellness discussion.
- [Certifications](/certifications): Quality and safety certifications.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the JWHERBAL team.

## Optional

- [Cart](/cart): Shopping cart (per-user).
